events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. The condition identified is reuse of torque-to-yield (TTY) fasteners marked TRD/CC one-time-use — these bolts plastically deform past yield on first torque, so reuse reduces clamp load unpredictably. Marked `fail`/`high` risk with rework actions (scrap and replace with new OEM TTY bolts, re-torque per spec, re-inspect).
